coupon.source_phrase_block: Pick up coupon at library. Pass allows up to 6 people discounted admission ($9.00/adult and $6.00/child) to the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo Library coupon holders are no longer required to make a timed ticket reservation. Patrons may walk in with the library coupon and purchase tickets for the discounted rate.
